settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your account, business details and store settings.

account.title: Account
account.manageProfile: Manage your profile information and preferences.
account.emailReadOnly: Your email address cannot be changed.
account.themeDescription: Choose your preference for light or dark mode.
account.profileUpdatedDescription: Your profile information has been saved.
account.profileErrorDescription: An error occurred while saving your profile.

password.title: Password
password.description: Change your password for extra security.
password.mismatchDescription: The new password and confirmation don't match.
password.tooShortDescription: Your password must be at least 6 characters.
password.updatedDescription: Your password has been updated successfully.
password.errorDescription: An error occurred while changing your password.

vat.intracom_goods: Intra-Community supply exempt from VAT - Art. 138 VAT Directive 2006/112/EC
vat.intracom_services: VAT reverse charged to customer - Art. 196 VAT Directive 2006/112/EC
vat.export: Export exempt from VAT - Art. 146 VAT Directive 2006/112/EC
vat.oss_applied: VAT calculated under OSS scheme (One-Stop-Shop) - destination country rate

invoiceTexts.title: VAT Invoice Texts
invoiceTexts.description: Legal texts displayed on invoices for special VAT situations. Text is shown in customer's language.
invoiceTexts.intracomGoodsDescription: For deliveries of goods to B2B customers with valid EU VAT number in another EU country
invoiceTexts.intracomServicesDescription: For services to B2B customers with valid EU VAT number in another EU country
invoiceTexts.exportDescription: For deliveries to customers outside the European Union
invoiceTexts.ossDescription: For B2C sales to consumers in other EU countries under the OSS scheme
invoiceTexts.defaultTexts: These are the legally correct default texts. Customize only if necessary.

oss.title: Apply OSS scheme
oss.description: One-Stop-Shop scheme for EU B2C sales to consumers in other EU countries. This automatically applies the VAT rate of the destination country.
oss.threshold_warning: You are approaching the OSS threshold of €10,000. Consider OSS registration.
oss.threshold_exceeded: OSS threshold exceeded! OSS registration is mandatory.

invoice_texts.title: Invoice texts
invoice_texts.subtitle: Texts displayed on invoices for special VAT situations
invoice_texts.intracom_goods_help: This text appears on invoices for B2B customers with a valid EU VAT number
invoice_texts.export_help: This text appears on invoices for customers outside the EU

decision_tree.title: VAT decision tree
decision_tree.subtitle: Overview of how VAT is calculated per situation

vies.require_validation: Require VIES validation for reverse charge
vies.block_on_invalid: Block order on invalid VAT number

rules.title: VAT rules for international trade
rules.description: These settings determine how VAT is calculated based on customer type and location
rules.b2b_valid_vat: B2B + valid EU VAT number: Reverse charge (0%)
rules.b2b_invalid_vat: B2B without valid VAT number in EU: Standard VAT rate
rules.b2c_domestic: B2C in own country: Standard VAT rate
rules.b2c_eu_oss: B2C in other EU country (with OSS): VAT rate of destination country

peppol.title: Peppol E-Invoicing
peppol.description: Configure Peppol for electronic B2B invoicing. Mandatory in Belgium from January 1, 2026.
peppol.peppolIdHelp: Your endpoint ID for receiving e-invoices. Common schemes: 0208 (Belgium KBO), 0106 (Netherlands KvK), 9925 (VAT number)
peppol.mandatoryNotice: From January 1, 2026, Peppol e-invoicing is mandatory for B2B transactions in Belgium.
peppol.mandatory_notice: Mandatory for B2B invoices in Belgium from January 1, 2026
peppol.facturxDescription: All invoices are sent as Factur-X PDF. These hybrid invoices contain embedded XML data that can be automatically imported by accounting software like Odoo, Exact and SAP.
peppol.phaseInfo: For Belgian B2B invoices, UBL XML is also generated. Download the UBL file and send via your accounting software or Access Point provider to the Peppol network.
peppol.missingCustomerIdWarning: Warning: This B2B customer does not have a Peppol ID yet. Request this from the customer.
peppol.customerPeppolIdHelp: The customer's endpoint ID for receiving e-invoices
peppol.b2b_peppol_required: This B2B invoice must be sent via Peppol

creditnote.title: Credit Note
creditnote.description: Create a credit note for this invoice.
creditnote.reason_placeholder: e.g. Return, Incorrect billing, Damaged product

ogm.label: Structured reference
ogm.payment_instruction: Please include the structured reference with your payment

vat_rates.title: VAT rates
vat_rates.description: Manage VAT rates per country for correct invoicing
vat_rates.no_rates: No VAT rates found for this country
vat_rates.delete_description: Are you sure you want to delete this VAT rate? This action cannot be undone.

vat.intracom_services: VAT reverse charged to customer - Art. 196 VAT Directive 2006/112/EC
vat.export: Export exempt from VAT - Art. 146 VAT Directive 2006/112/EC
vat.oss_applied: VAT calculated under OSS scheme (One-Stop-Shop) - destination country rate

archive.title: Invoice Archive
archive.description: Documents are retained for 7 years in accordance with Belgian law
archive.retention_notice: Documents are retained for 7 years in accordance with Belgian law
